title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 159.4 resistance — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD — pair holds at 1.1765.

title: AUD/USD
text: RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; AUD/USD consolidating above 0.71.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.1 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment.

title: USD/JPY Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX positive correlation signals JPY has lost safe-haven function — watch for further USD/JPY gains.
